calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-15-2016 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to Government Code 68608(b). JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk MOlopernes; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-24-2016 Continued To Nov-15-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appeareance by Plaintiff. Self Represented Plaintiff Wayne Smith is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set Nov-15-2016 at 10:30 AM in Dept. 610. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk JLee. Proceedings not reported. (610)

MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Self-represented Plaintiff Wayne Smith is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is reset to AUG-23-2016 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. *** NOTICE: Impending Discretionary Dismissal pursuant to Government Code 68608(b). ***
JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk MOlopernes. Proceedings not reported. (610)
